category_sources: source_facts.description says CD/DVD inserts and envelopes; official aczoom page and manpage document cdlabelgen for CD/DVD labels, inserts, traycards, and envelopes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdlabelgen; official aczoom page and GitHub repository use cdlabelgen.
docs_sources: Official aczoom project page links the cdlabelgen man page; the manpage is hosted on the same official site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official aczoom project page explicitly links 'cdlabelgen and cdinsert on GitHub' to https://github.com/avinash311/cdlabelgen.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists cdlabelgen; official aczoom page says source is Perl and PostScript and the manpage describes CD/DVD label and insert generation.
